title: Penalty
doc_html:
§503.  Penalty

Whoever violates R.S. 32:501 and 32:502 shall be fined not less than two hundred and fifty dollars nor more than five hundred dollars, or imprisoned in the parish jail for not less than thirty nor more than ninety days, or both.
doc_text:
§503.  Penalty
Whoever violates R.S. 32:501 and 32:502 shall be fined not less than two hundred and fifty dollars nor more than five hundred dollars, or imprisoned in the parish jail for not less than thirty nor more than ninety days, or both.
